description: Mock mode configuration for behavior tree nodes

vision.description: Mock all vision-related nodes (object detection, feature extraction, point cloud, etc.)

manipulation.description: Mock all manipulation nodes (arm movement, grasping, gripper control, etc.)

navigation.description: Mock all navigation nodes (goto, follow, path planning, etc.)

audio_input.description: Mock audio input nodes (speech recognition, listening, phrase extraction, etc.) but NOT announcements

announcement.description: Mock announcement nodes (TTS in English and Chinese). Set to false to use real TTS when hardware is available. Note: If ROS packages are missing, this will be mocked regardless of this setting.

keyboard_control.description: Wait for keyboard press in mock mode before returning success
